'''âk-v-n''' ('''kakavan''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:whap|whap]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-v-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:whap|whap]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âk-v-n
|-
! Lemma
| kakavan
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thikavan|thikavan]] || [[word:jikavan|jikavan]] || [[word:shikavan|shikavan]] || [[word:kikavan|kikavan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthukavan|thuthukavan]] || [[word:jujukavan|jujukavan]] || [[word:shushukavan|shushukavan]] || [[word:kukukavan|kukukavan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thukavan|thukavan]] || [[word:jukavan|jukavan]] || [[word:shukavan|shukavan]] || [[word:kukavan|kukavan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thukavan|thukavan]] || [[word:jukavan|jukavan]] || [[word:shukavan|shukavan]] || [[word:kukavan|kukavan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thekavan|thekavan]] || [[word:jekavan|jekavan]] || [[word:shekavan|shekavan]] || [[word:kekavan|kekavan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothokavan|thothokavan]] || [[word:jojokavan|jojokavan]] || [[word:shoshokavan|shoshokavan]] || [[word:kokokavan|kokokavan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thokavan|thokavan]] || [[word:jokavan|jokavan]] || [[word:shokavan|shokavan]] || [[word:kokavan|kokavan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thokavan|thokavan]] || [[word:jokavan|jokavan]] || [[word:shokavan|shokavan]] || [[word:kokavan|kokavan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠkavan|thĂŠkavan]] || [[word:jĂŠkavan|jĂŠkavan]] || [[word:shĂŠkavan|shĂŠkavan]] || [[word:kĂŠkavan|kĂŠkavan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathakavan|thathakavan]] || [[word:jajakavan|jajakavan]] || [[word:shashakavan|shashakavan]] || [[word:kakakavan|kakakavan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thakavan|thakavan]] || [[word:jakavan|jakavan]] || [[word:shakavan|shakavan]] || [[word:kakavan|kakavan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thakavan|thakavan]] || [[word:jakavan|jakavan]] || [[word:shakavan|shakavan]] || [[word:kakavan|kakavan]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shakavan|shakavan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshakavan|goshakavan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishakavan|gokishakavan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shakavanĂŒ|shakavanĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshakavanknĂŒ|goshakavanknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishakavanĂŒ|gokishakavanĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shakavanshĂ«|shakavanshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshakavankshĂ«|goshakavankshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishakavanshĂ«|gokishakavanshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakavanro|shakavanro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakavankro|goshakavankro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakavanro|gokishakavanro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shakavanmu|shakavanmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakavankmu|goshakavankmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakavanmu|gokishakavanmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shakavansher|shakavansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshakavanksher|goshakavanksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishakavansher|gokishakavansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shakavang|shakavang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshakavankng|goshakavankng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishakavang|gokishakavang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shakavanya|shakavanya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshakavankya|goshakavankya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishakavanya|gokishakavanya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shakavanyam|shakavanyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshakavankyam|goshakavankyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishakavanyam|gokishakavanyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakavanĂŒshĂ«|shakavanĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakavanknĂŒshĂ«|goshakavanknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakavanĂŒshĂ«|gokishakavanĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakavanĂŒro|shakavanĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakavanknĂŒro|goshakavanknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakavanĂŒro|gokishakavanĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakavanĂŒmu|shakavanĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakavanknĂŒmu|goshakavanknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakavanĂŒmu|gokishakavanĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakavanshĂ«nĂŒ|shakavanshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakavankshĂ«nĂŒ|goshakavankshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakavanshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishakavanshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakavanshĂ«ro|shakavanshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakavankshĂ«ro|goshakavankshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakavanshĂ«ro|gokishakavanshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakavanshĂ«mu|shakavanshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakavankshĂ«mu|goshakavankshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakavanshĂ«mu|gokishakavanshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakavanronĂŒ|shakavanronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakavankronĂŒ|goshakavankronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakavanronĂŒ|gokishakavanronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakavanroshĂ«|shakavanroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakavankroshĂ«|goshakavankroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakavanroshĂ«|gokishakavanroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakavanromu|shakavanromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakavankromu|goshakavankromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakavanromu|gokishakavanromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakavanmunĂŒ|shakavanmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakavankmunĂŒ|goshakavankmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakavanmunĂŒ|gokishakavanmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakavanmushĂ«|shakavanmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakavankmushĂ«|goshakavankmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakavanmushĂ«|gokishakavanmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakavanmuro|shakavanmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakavankmuro|goshakavankmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakavanmuro|gokishakavanmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
